summary: Ukrainian forces repelled mechanized assaults by Russian troops in the Novopavlivka and Dobropillia directions in late January, destroying enemy tanks with support from the National Guard’s Lasar’s Group and adjacent units. Russian forces, operating under the "Rubikon" Center, conducted 88 strikes on Ukrainian positions in the Donbas and Krasny Liman areas on March 7, 2026, including FPV drone intercepts of Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs. Ukrainian operators used ZALA Lancet loitering munitions to hit group targets despite Russian electronic warfare interference, maximizing strike efficiency. In the Kharkiv region, Ukrainian forces destroyed a Polish AHS Krab self-propelled howitzer using an FPV drone. Meanwhile, Ukrainian drone crews reported difficulty meeting Defense Ministry targets due to reduced Russian troop concentrations within operational range.
